meaning: n.拉丁文,拉丁语,拉丁语族的adj.拉丁文的,拉丁语的,拉丁人的
examples: Very few students learn Latin now.
Latin nouns have case, number and gender.
Do you know any other Latin American dances?
While many economies are still struggling to recover, Latin America's art scene is thriving once again.
The buzz on the streets is undeniably Latin American, of course, which creates an intoxicating blend.
